name: multi-topic-session
description: Mixed session covering two unrelated topics. Tests whether the model produces SEPARATE pages per topic rather than mashing them together. The two topics share no semantic overlap; if the model emits one mixed concept page it has failed at scoping.

observations.title: user prompt
observations.body: the docker image is 380 MB which is way too big — can we strip debug symbols and use a distroless base?

observations.title: Edit
observations.body: Dockerfile: stage 1 rust:slim, stage 2 gcr.io/distroless/cc-debian12, strip symbols via CARGO_PROFILE_RELEASE_STRIP=symbols

observations.title: docker build
observations.body: image dropped from 380 MB to 67 MB

observations.title: user prompt
observations.body: great. unrelated — I noticed `cargo audit` is failing in CI on a transitive dep `xml-rs` with RUSTSEC-2024-xxxx. can we work around?

observations.title: Read
observations.body: Cargo.lock — xml-rs is pulled in by git2 → libgit2-sys → vendored-libgit2 transitively

observations.title: user prompt
observations.body: git2 is load-bearing for the wiki versioning so we can't drop it. add an ignore entry in audit.toml with a TODO+date to revisit

observations.title: Write
observations.body: audit.toml: ignore RUSTSEC-2024-xxxx with note 'transitive via libgit2-sys; revisit 2026-08'

observations.title: session end
observations.body: two distinct deliverables: docker slim + audit workaround
